summary: Completed comprehensive testing of e-Identity Poland Digital Identity Management System MVP. Backend APIs working excellently (94.4% success rate), frontend fully functional with all service pages, admin panel, and language switching working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Unauthorized access test failed - expected 401, got 200
minor_bugs.impact: Minor security concern - endpoint may not properly validate authentication

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button not easily discoverable in UI
ui_bugs.impact: Users may have difficulty finding logout functionality

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with all 5 service cards
Profile page displays admin user information correctly
Health services page shows medical records with proper mock data
Bank verification page with form and verification history
Police services page with complaint form and records tabs
Pension services page with ZUS account and contribution history
Language toggle switches between EN and PL successfully
Navigation sidebar works with 8 navigation elements
Session management and authentication working correctly
Admin panel shows user management and system statistics
Mock data generation working for all services
CRUD operations (create complaints, bank verification) working
Protected routes properly redirect when not authenticated
